---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: v2x-mesh
  labels:
    name: v2x-mesh
    environment: production

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: v2x-mesh-config
  namespace: v2x-mesh
data:
  MESH_NODE_POOL: "v2x-edge"
  BEACON_INTERVAL_S: "1.0"
  EVENT_BROADCAST_RADIUS_M: "1000"
  SHADOWTAG_ENDPOINT: "http://shadowtag-service.default.svc.cluster.local:8003"
  REDIS_HOST: "redis-master.default.svc.cluster.local"
  REDIS_PORT: "6379"
  ENABLE_GPU: "true"
  LOG_LEVEL: "INFO"

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: v2x-mesh-secrets
  namespace: v2x-mesh
type: Opaque
stringData:
  GOOGLE_CONTENT_SAFETY_API_KEY: "placeholder-key"
  HIVE_MODERATION_API_KEY: "placeholder-key"
  TEE_MASTER_KEY: "placeholder-tee-key"

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: v2x-mesh-gateway
  namespace: v2x-mesh
  labels:
    app: v2x-mesh-gateway
    tier: edge
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: v2x-mesh-gateway
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: v2x-mesh-gateway
        tier: edge
      annotations:
        prometheus.io/scrape: "true"
        prometheus.io/port: "8012"
        prometheus.io/path: "/metrics"
    spec:
      nodeSelector:
        workload-type: v2x-edge
      tolerations:
        - key: "v2x-edge"
          operator: "Equal"
          value: "true"
          effect: "NoSchedule"
      containers:
        - name: v2x-gateway
          image: gcr.io/PROJECT_ID/v2x-mesh:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - name: http
              containerPort: 8010
              protocol: TCP
            - name: websocket
              containerPort: 8011
              protocol: TCP
            - name: metrics
              containerPort: 8012
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: SERVICE_NAME
              value: "v2x-mesh-gateway"
            - name: MESH_NODE_POOL
              valueFrom:
                configMapKeyRef:
                  name: v2x-mesh-config
                  key: MESH_NODE_POOL
            - name: SHADOWTAG_ENDPOINT
              valueFrom:
                configMapKeyRef:
                  name: v2x-mesh-config
                  key: SHADOWTAG_ENDPOINT
            - name: REDIS_HOST
              valueFrom:
                configMapKeyRef:
                  name: v2x-mesh-config
                  key: REDIS_HOST
            - name: GOOGLE_CONTENT_SAFETY_API_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: v2x-mesh-secrets
                  key: GOOGLE_CONTENT_SAFETY_API_KEY
            - name: HIVE_MODERATION_API_KEY
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: v2x-mesh-secrets
                  key: HIVE_MODERATION_API_KEY
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 1Gi
            limits:
              cpu: 2000m
              memory: 4Gi
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /health
              port: 8012
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /ready
              port: 8012
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: cache
              mountPath: /app/cache
      volumes:
        - name: cache
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 1Gi

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: v2x-tower-cache
  namespace: v2x-mesh
  labels:
    app: v2x-tower-cache
    tier: infrastructure
spec:
  replicas: 5
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: v2x-tower-cache
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: v2x-tower-cache
        tier: infrastructure
    spec:
      nodeSelector:
        workload-type: v2x-edge
      containers:
        - name: tower-cache
          image: gcr.io/PROJECT_ID/v2x-tower-cache:latest
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - name: cache
              containerPort: 8013
              protocol: TCP
          env:
            - name: CACHE_SIZE_GB
              value: "10"
            - name: REDIS_HOST
              valueFrom:
                configMapKeyRef:
                  name: v2x-mesh-config
                  key: REDIS_HOST
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 1000m
              memory: 12Gi
              nvidia.com/gpu: 1  # GPU for inference caching
            limits:
              cpu: 4000m
              memory: 16Gi
              nvidia.com/gpu: 1
          volumeMounts:
            - name: cache-storage
              mountPath: /cache
      volumes:
        - name: cache-storage
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 20Gi

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: v2x-mesh-gateway
  namespace: v2x-mesh
  labels:
    app: v2x-mesh-gateway
spec:
  type: LoadBalancer
  selector:
    app: v2x-mesh-gateway
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8010
      protocol: TCP
    - name: websocket
      port: 8011
      targetPort: 8011
      protocol: TCP
    - name: metrics
      port: 8012
      targetPort: 8012
      protocol: TCP
  sessionAffinity: ClientIP

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: v2x-tower-cache
  namespace: v2x-mesh
  labels:
    app: v2x-tower-cache
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    app: v2x-tower-cache
  ports:
    - name: cache
      port: 8013
      targetPort: 8013
      protocol: TCP

---
apiVersion: autoscaling/v2
kind: HorizontalPodAutoscaler
metadata:
  name: v2x-mesh-gateway-hpa
  namespace: v2x-mesh
spec:
  scaleTargetRef:
    apiVersion: apps/v1
    kind: Deployment
    name: v2x-mesh-gateway
  minReplicas: 3
  maxReplicas: 20
  metrics:
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: cpu
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 70
    - type: Resource
      resource:
        name: memory
        target:
          type: Utilization
          averageUtilization: 80
    - type: Pods
      pods:
        metric:
          name: mesh_messages_per_second
        target:
          type: AverageValue
          averageValue: "1000"

---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: v2x-mesh-gateway-pdb
  namespace: v2x-mesh
spec:
  minAvailable: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: v2x-mesh-gateway

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: v2x-mesh-network-policy
  namespace: v2x-mesh
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: v2x-mesh-gateway
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: default
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              tier: edge
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8010
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8011
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              name: default
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8003  # ShadowTag
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 6379  # Redis
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 443  # External APIs (Google, Hive)

Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive view of the cell tower and V2X mesh infrastructure in the codebase. Let me compile my findings.

## Search Results: Cell Tower, V2X Mesh, and Telecom Infrastructure

I found substantial code related to cell towers, V2X mesh networking, and edge network infrastructure. Here's what exists in this codebase:

### 1. **V2X Mesh Services** (`/services/v2x-mesh/`)

The codebase contains a complete V2X (Vehicle-to-Everything) mesh networking implementation with these core components:

**API Service** (`api.py`):
- FastAPI application managing V2X mesh network with endpoints for:
  - Event broadcasting (`POST /v1/events`)
  - Map feature management (`POST /v1/map/features`)
  - Mesh peer queries (`GET /v1/mesh/peers`)
  - Real-time WebSocket streaming (`WS /v1/mesh/stream`)
  - Mesh statistics (`GET /v1/mesh/stats`)
- Integrates with safety moderation, edge reasoning, and attestation services

**ARMP Protocol** (`armp_protocol.py`):
- Core mesh protocol with message types:
  - BEACON: Periodic presence announcements
  - EVENT: Critical safety events (collision risk, hard brake)
  - MAPDELTA: CRDT-based map updates
  - CONSENSUS: Multi-node agreement on shared state
  - REVOCATION: Identity/credential revocation
- Priority levels for RF contention: CRITICAL (<50ms), HIGH (<100ms), MEDIUM (<500ms), LOW (<2s)
- Geographic scoping for message propagation

**Gossip Protocol** (`gossip_protocol.py`):
- Epidemic-style message propagation with:
  - Geo-scoped TTL based on distance
  - Anti-entropy periodic sync to recover missed messages
  - Adaptive fanout based on network density
  - Rate limiting with token bucket algorithm
  - Peer reliability scoring
  - Haversine distance calculations for geographic routing

**Other V2X Services**:
- `vehicle_client.py`: Vehicle communication client
- `safety_moderation.py`: Content moderation for mesh events
- `shadowtag_attestation.py`: ShadowTag attestation for vehicle verification
- `edge_reasoning.py`: AI reasoning pipeline for edge inference
- `crdt_mapping.py`: CRDT-based collaborative mapping system

### 2. **Cell Tower & Edge Mesh Infrastructure** (`src/aerospace/infrastructure/edge_mesh.py`)

Comprehensive architecture implementing a unified sky-ground GPU mesh:

**Node Types**:
- `CellTowerNode`: Cell tower edge compute nodes with:
  - GPU pods (CoreWeave L40S, H100 configurations)
  - Satellite uplinks (Starlink, V-band, hybrid)
  - Fiber backhaul connectivity
  - Coverage radius (typically 5km)
  - Monthly lease costs ($2,000+ per tower)
  - Total monthly cost: GPU rental + uplink OPEX + tower lease

**Satellite Uplink Configurations**:
- Starlink standard: 10 Gbps at Ka-band (28 GHz), 25ms latency
- Starlink enterprise: 50 Gbps Ka-band, 20ms latency
- V-band next-gen: 100 Gbps at 60 GHz, 15ms latency
- Hybrid redundant: 60 Gbps with failover, 98% weather resilience

**GPU Pod Configurations**:
- L40S Dual: 180 TFLOPS INT8, $2.40/hour
- L40S Quad: 360 TFLOPS, $4.80/hour
- H100 Single: 200 TFLOPS, $3.50/hour
- H100 Dual: 400 TFLOPS, $7.00/hour

**Economics & ROI Calculations**:
- Per-tower CAPEX: $50,000
- Monthly OPEX: $12,000 average
- Monthly revenue: $30,000 (3k/tower)
- Projected ROI analysis for fleet deployments
- Latency improvement vs cloud: 150ms baseline → 70ms with tower GPU

**Vehicle Integration**:
- Tesla HW5/HW6 as edge compute nodes
- 40 TFLOPS INT8 per vehicle
- Compute-for-transit revenue model

### 3. **Tower Monitoring Service** (`src/tegu/services/tower_monitoring.py`)

Specialized service for tower equipment health:
- YOLOv3-based object detection for tower inspection
- Detects: antennas, equipment damage, ice accumulation, bird nests, structural issues
- AiUCRM compliance validation (FAA, FCC frameworks)
- Batch inspection capabilities
- Damage assessment and maintenance recommendations

### 4. **Kubernetes Deployment** (`infrastructure/k8s/v2x-mesh-deployment.yaml`)

Production deployment configuration:

**V2X Mesh Gateway**:
- 3 replicas (auto-scales 3-20 pods)
- Workload: v2x-edge node pool
- Resources: 500m CPU / 1Gi RAM (requests), 2 CPU / 4Gi (limits)
- Ports: 8010 (HTTP), 8011 (WebSocket), 8012 (Metrics)

**V2X Tower Cache**:
- 5 replicas for distributed caching
- GPU support (nvidia.com/gpu: 1 per pod)
- 10GB cache storage
- Connected to Redis for state management

**Infrastructure Services**:
- Redis for message caching and state
- ShadowTag service for attestation
- Google Content Safety API integration
- Hive moderation API integration
- TEE master key management

**Network Policy**:
- Ingress from default namespace
- Egress to: ShadowTag (8003), Redis (6379), External APIs (443)
- PodDisruptionBudget ensures 2 minimum replicas

### 5. **Key Integration Points**

- **Starlink + CoreWeave**: LEO satellites integrate with cell tower GPU pods
- **Tesla Fleet**: Vehicles contribute compute capacity and coverage
- **Moderation**: Content safety checks on events and map updates
- **Attestation**: ShadowTag provides vehicle identity verification
- **Messaging**: ARMP protocol with Ed25519 signatures
- **Distributed State**: CRDT-based map with eventual consistency

### 6. **Technical Capabilities**

- Sub-70ms end-to-end latency (device → satellite → ground → tower GPU → back)
- Geographic message scoping (5km default range)
- Adaptive network fanout (3-8 peers based on density)
- Rate limiting per priority level (Critical: 200/s, High: 100/s, Medium: 50/s, Low: 20/s)
- Replay attack detection
- Anti-entropy sync for message recovery
- Prometheus metrics export

This is a sophisticated edge computing infrastructure designed to support V2X vehicle communication, AI inference at cell towers, and satellite connectivity for global coverage.
